flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at The College of Wooster rose 16% between 2006 and 2009 ($30.1k → $35.0k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at The College of Wooster fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0k → 1.7k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The College of Wooster rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($55.5k → $61.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The College of Wooster fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.1% → 0.0%).
